# sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb (Data Source)

Information about an AppRun dedicated load balancer

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster" "main" {
  name = "ExampleCluster"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group" "main" {
  cluster_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  name       = "ExampleASG"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb" "by_id" {
  cluster_id            = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  auto_scaling_group_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group.main.id
  id                    = "A5F8D577-7395-4EB4-83D9-AC60A1EF2C5B"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb" "by_name" {
  cluster_id            = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  auto_scaling_group_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group.main.id
  name                  = "ExampleLB"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auto_scaling_group_id` (String) The auto scaling group ID that the lb belongs to
- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster ID that the lb belongs to

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the lb.
- `name` (String) The name of the lb.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp of the lb
- `deleting` (Boolean) Whether the load balancer is being deleted
- `interfaces` (Attributes Set) The network interfaces for the load balancer (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces))
- `name_servers` (List of String) The name servers for the load balancer
- `service_class_path` (String) The service class path of the load balancer

<a id="nestedatt--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `default_gateway` (String) The default gateway
- `interface_index` (Number) The interface index
- `ip_pool` (Attributes Set) The IP pool for the interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces--ip_pool))
- `netmask` (Number) The netmask length
- `packet_filter_id` (String) The packet filter ID
- `upstream` (String) The upstream network
- `vip` (String) The VIP address
- `virtual_router_id` (Number) The virtual router ID

<a id="nestedatt--interfaces--ip_pool"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces.ip_pool`

Read-Only:

- `end` (String) The end IP address of the range
- `start` (String) The start IP address of the range
